summary: Iteration 44: Verified 4 mobile/PWA fixes - Code review confirms all CSS/HTML changes are properly implemented. Due to 2FA authentication, UI testing was limited to login page viewport meta verification.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All code changes verified through source code review

admin_tvt_text_truncation.verification: Line 129: div has flex-1 min-w-0 classes; Lines 130-132: Estate name, uploader, and file name all have 'truncate' class applied

sdv_category_tabs_wrapping.verification: Line 543: TabsList uses 'flex flex-wrap gap-1 h-auto w-full' - tabs will wrap to multiple lines instead of horizontal scrolling

guardian_stop_button.verification: Lines 273-281: stopAnalysis function with AbortController; Lines 639-646: Stop button with data-testid='stop-analysis-btn' shown during loading state

guardian_overscroll_behavior.verification: Lines 354, 358, 508, 558: overscrollBehavior: 'none' and 'contain' applied to main containers

pinch_to_zoom_viewport_meta.verification: Line 6: viewport meta has 'maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=no, viewport-fit=cover' - confirmed via Playwright test

pinch_to_zoom_gesture_listeners.verification: Lines 7-9: gesturestart/change/end preventDefault; Lines 12-19: Double-tap zoom prevention with 300ms threshold

mobile_touch_action_css.verification: Lines 803-806: .mobile-header has touch-action: none and overscroll-behavior: none; Lines 810-815: .mobile-bottom-nav has same properties

playwright_verification.viewport_meta_test: PASS - Viewport content confirmed: 'width=device-width, initial-scale=1, maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=no, viewport-fit=cover'

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 reported mobile/PWA issues have code fixes verified. Due to 2FA on authentication, could not visually test authenticated pages (VaultPage tabs, GuardianPage stop button, Admin TVT). Code review confirms correct implementation: (1) TransitionTab.js uses min-w-0 + truncate for text overflow, (2) VaultPage.js TabsList uses flex-wrap instead of overflow-x-auto, (3) GuardianPage.js has stopAnalysis function and Stop button in loading state with overscroll-behavior CSS, (4) index.html viewport meta has maximum-scale=1 user-scalable=no, (5) index.js has gesture event listeners, (6) index.css has touch-action: none on mobile nav elements.
testing_limitations: 2FA authentication prevented interactive testing of authenticated pages. Verification was done via source code review and viewport meta tag verification via Playwright.
